global_description: Small marsupial with a stout, rounded body and large, fluffy ears. Its fur is thick and soft, predominantly gray with a lighter underside. The face is flat with a large, black nose and small, dark eyes. It has strong limbs with sharp claws for climbing.
discriminative_attributes: Flat face with large black nose

part_details.head: Flat with large black nose and small dark eyes
part_details.ears: Large and fluffy, covered in soft fur
part_details.body: Stout and rounded, covered in thick gray fur
part_details.limbs: Strong with sharp claws for climbing
part_details.fur: Thick, soft, predominantly gray with lighter underside

spatial_relations: Ears positioned on top of head
Limbs attached to sides of body
